name: encryptor.link
description: A zero-knowledge, client-side encrypted message and file sharing service. Send encrypted messages and files that self-destruct after being viewed.

scripts.build: tsc esbuild.config.ts --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --outDir build_tmp && node build_tmp/esbuild.config.js
scripts.build:watch: tsc esbuild.config.ts --module commonjs --esModuleInterop --outDir build_tmp && node build_tmp/esbuild.config.js --watch
